leaks.title: No automated follow-up sequence
leaks.description: Leads go cold within 48 hours without a structured nurture sequence. This is your #1 revenue leak.

leaks.title: Onboarding drop-off at step 3
leaks.description: 62% of new customers abandon your onboarding flow at the third step. Simplify or add guidance.

leaks.title: Landing page conversion below 2%
leaks.description: Your primary landing page converts at 1.3%. Industry benchmark is 3-5%. Test headlines and CTAs.

leaks.title: No re-engagement campaign
leaks.description: Customers who haven't purchased in 60+ days receive no outreach. Build an automated win-back sequence.

leaks.title: Missing upsell opportunities
leaks.description: Post-purchase flow doesn't include cross-sell or upsell offers. Add them within the first 7 days.
